text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Urgh! What the heck's going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No freaking way! There's, like, nothing we can do about this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I step out onto the academy roof one day to find
Nakayama Festa and Tosen Jordan in a bind.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Hey, stay away from here! This place is a
danger zone right now!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
W-wait!
...Hey, listen! It's Golshi—she's acting all weird!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Good morning to you. Such fine
weather we're having.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Lovely days such as this are so serene. They make
me feel absolutely refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Whatever is the matter, Trainer? Is there
something on my face, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
She's been like this all morning! Maybe she ate
something bad? That's gotta be it!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Or maybe she bashed her head on something.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, such peculiar statements. I am behaving
exactly as I usually do.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The ever-cheerful and entertaining Jordan and
Nakayama—I'm so very fond of you both.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: This is too much... Even for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I just remembered that I baked some cookies.
Would you care to try one, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a cookie from Gold Ship. The sweet,
mellow flavor caresses my taste buds.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm pleased it's to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you enjoy my cooking so thoroughly is
almost enough to make me blush.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Say what?! I-I think I'm gonna pass out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something abnormal is definitely going on here.
And I need to figure out what...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something abnormal is definitely going on here.
And I need to figure out what...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Tch, you want me to help with this?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But I guess... all we have to do is return Golshi to
her hotheaded, unhinged self, right?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Golshi! I think I want to play that game you
love—the one where you swap out a sea urchin's
spines with ones from a chestnut!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll snap right back to your ridiculous
senses once you start playing!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let's see who can finish swapping spines
the fastest!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Sea urchin spines... and chestnut spines, you
say?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry. I'm not quite sure what you're talking
about.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why do such a thing? Sea urchin spines and
chestnut spines? What meaning is there in doing
that?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You tell me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly sorry, Nakayama. I just can't comprehend
this game of yours.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But each to their own, of course! I think it's just
terrific that you enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing we tried seemed to work, but for some
inexplicable reason, Gold Ship was back to her
usual self after a good night's sleep.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Y-you want my help?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! This is way too much for me to
handle!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Jordan. You're our last hope.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't go weaseling your way outta this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Arrrghhhh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Grr... Aaaaghhhh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: G-Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Um, yes?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'll... let you kick me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Just this once! I'll let you boost your vibes by
kicking me like you always do!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whatever are you talking about? I could
never kick one of my precious friends.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, do you enjoy being kicked, perhaps? Um, well, I think that's just wonderful! Different strokes for different folks, and all!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What the heck?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing we tried seemed to work, but for some
inexplicable reason, Gold Ship was back to her
usual self after a good night's sleep.
